steps.title: Use the rough-feet clue
steps.content: The snowy "carpet" looks too delicate to be stepped on by rough feet. In context, the word describes something easily damaged by contact.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: Choice A means giving or charitable. Choice C means precise or correct. Choice D means containing nothing. None of those explain why rough feet should not step on the snow. The answer is B.
